name: Lisa
goal: Lisa wants to suggest a vibrant city destination for their holiday that offers a mix of cultural experiences and delicious food, similar to her recent trip to Barcelona.
backstory: Lisa has just returned from a city break in Barcelona and is eager to plan another urban getaway with her friends. She loves exploring new cities and trying out local cuisine. Her past experiences have taught her that city breaks can be incredibly refreshing and rejuvenating.

focus_notes.cost: For Lisa, cost is a consideration, but not the top priority - she's willing to spend a bit more for a unique and memorable experience in a new city.
focus_notes.comfort: Lisa values comfort and will prioritize destinations with good accommodation options and amenities, but won't rule out cities that are a bit more off the beaten path.
focus_notes.time: With a limited amount of time for the holiday, Lisa wants to make the most of it and will look for destinations that offer a lot to see and do in a short period.
focus_notes.safety: As a city break enthusiast, Lisa is aware of the potential safety concerns in urban areas and will research destinations to ensure they are safe for tourists.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Lisa appreciates flexibility in travel plans and will look for destinations that offer a range of activities and options, so everyone can do their own thing if they want to.
